item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 020330Z AUTO 09005KT 9000 NSC 12/12 Q1019 TEMPO 0700 FG VV///
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 012333Z 0200/0224 11003KT 7000 NSC PROB40 TEMPO 0200/0206 4000 BR PROB30 TEMPO 0200/0206 0700 FG VV/// BECMG 0206/0209 21010KT PROB40 TEMPO 0210/0217 22012G25KT 4000 -SHRA BKN040CB PROB30 TEMPO 0210/0214 2500 -TSRA TEMPO 0221/0224 4000 -RA BKN030
